# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    stages {
        stage('Download Build Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def downloadUrl = params.DOWNLOAD_URL
                    sh "curl -o ${BUILD_ARTIFACT} -LJ $downloadUrl"
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Deploy Build Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def deploymentPath = params.DEPLOYMENT_PATH
                    sh "mv ${BUILD_ARTIFACT} $deploymentPath"
                    sshCommand remote: 'production-server', command: "cd $deploymentPath; sudo service myapp restart"
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
